name: Create New Account on Madison Store

As a new user,
I want to create new account  into Maddison Store

elements.name: Password validation
elements.description: Passwords are invalid if less than 4 characters

steps.name: I try to create an account with password "abc"
I should see that the password is "invalid"

elements.name: Password validation
elements.description: Passwords are invalid if less than 4 characters

steps.name: I try to create an account with password "ab1"
I should see that the password is "invalid"

elements.name: Password validation
elements.description: Passwords need both letters and numbers to be valid

steps.name: I try to create an account with password "abc1"
I should see that the password is "valid"

elements.name: Password validation
elements.description: Passwords need both letters and numbers to be valid

steps.name: I try to create an account with password "abcd"
I should see that the password is "invalid"

elements.name: Password validation
elements.description: Passwords need both letters and numbers to be valid

steps.name: I try to create an account with password "abcd1"
I should see that the password is "valid"
